channel.title: New TV Shows
channel.description: Newest TV shows on Netflix, Disney+, MGM+, Apple TV+, Prime Video

item.title: Young Farts Trailer Parts
item.description: Small-town brothers Jagger and Dawson run Young Farts RV Parts, a multi-million-dollar business where they turn trailer trash into cash. Between outrageous schemes, chaotic stunts, and big-hearted hijinks, these brothers chase one wild idea after the next - all for the love of their family and the empire they’re building.

item.title: The Hawk
item.description: On the back nine of his career, golf legend Lonnie "The Hawk" Hawkins chases one final major — and drags everyone he loves into the chaos.

item.title: Stranger Things: VHS Special Edition
item.description: Rewind and relive the first season with a video store vibe that's glitchy, grainy and gloriously vintage-just like you'd have rented it in 1983.

item.title: Ride or Die
item.description: Best friends, Judith and Debbie, know everything about each other … well, almost everything. Judith has been living a double life that Debbie knows nothing about: she is a highly trained assassin. When a hit goes horribly wrong, Judith and Debbie must go on the run together and work to repair their broken friendship—all while being targeted by a mysterious enemy who wants them dead. And only together, can they solve this layered mystery.

item.title: Switched on Pop
item.description: “Switched on Pop” is hosted by songwriter Charlie Harding and musicologist Nate Sloan, a professor at USC’s Thornton School of Music. The duo break down musical ideas and production choices behind today’s biggest hits, pulling songs apart to understand how they work and why they matter.

item.title: Lucky
item.description: When a multi-million-dollar heist goes sideways, con artist Lucky is forced to go on the run. Pursued by both the FBI and a ruthless crime boss, Lucky must fight for her life—and a way out.

item.title: Unexplainable
item.description: Unexplainable takes listeners right up to the edge of what we know…and then keeps on going. The Unexplainable team — Noam Hassenfeld, Byrd Pinkerton, and Meradith Hoddinott — tackles scientific mysteries, unanswered questions, and everything we learn diving into the unknown.

item.title: Hot Ones: Extra Heat
item.description: In this exclusive new series of specials, celebrity guests are challenges to answer spicy questions while eating even spicier wings.

item.title: On Purpose with Jay Shetty
item.description: One of the most popular podcasts in the world, On Purpose features in-depth conversations with influential voices across culture, wellness, and personal growth.

item.title: Murder 101
item.description: Part teen drama, part masterclass, and part edge-of-your-seat crime investigation, follow a high school sociology class in rural Tennessee who help revive a decades-old case into a present-day hunt for a killer.

item.title: The Westies
item.description: As the Javits Center construction project ignites a battle for profit in early 1980s Hell's Kitchen, a generational rift threatens the uneasy peace between violent Irish gang the Westies and the Mafia, and draws FBI heat.

item.title: Little House on the Prairie
item.description: The close-knit Ingalls family builds a new life on the Western frontier, where the joys of nature and the struggle for survival are deeply intertwined.

item.title: Bluey Compilations
item.description: In this series of compilations, Bluey uses her limitless energy to play games that unfold in hilarious ways, bringing her family and the whole neighborhood into her world of fun.

item.title: Worst Neighbor Ever
item.description: This intense documentary series details true stories of neighbors gone bad, from heinous fraud schemes to senseless acts of violent retribution.

item.title: Elle
item.description: Before Elle Woods was a fish-out-of-water at Harvard, we meet her in 1995 in the tumultuous waters of high school where she encounters tricky friendships, forbidden romance, and questionable fashion choices. In this unexpected chapter of her adolescence, we learn about the experiences that shaped Elle into the iconic young woman we've come to know and love.

item.title: Adventure Time: Side Quests
item.description: Young hero Finn and his magical dog best friend Jake embark on adventures across the fantastical land of Ooo — partying with cloud people and punching evil in the butt along the way.

item.title: The Doomies
item.description: When best friends Bobby and Romy mistakenly open up a gateway to another world, they turn their sleepy coastal town into a hotspot for terrifying creatures of doom. Roped into an epic supernatural mystery, they will cross paths with the so-called “Chosen One” and do battle with both literal and inner monsters.

item.title: What Would You Rather?: Decide to Survive
item.description: Romesh Ranganathan hosts ten UK online stars playing Would You Rather for real. Fiendish dilemmas decide everything, from hilarious supersized games to how they eat and sleep. There's no right decision, but making the least worst choice could guarantee survival (in the game, not literally). You've played it hypothetically, now they're playing it for real, and only one will be crowned champion.

item.title: Would You Rather: Decide to Survive
item.description: Would You Rather be invisible or be able to fly? Fight one giant duck or 1000 tiny ducks? Eat a man-sized bean or a bean-sized man? This comedy game show will see two teams of some of Britain's funniest digital personalities compete in hilarious real-life challenges based on classic hypothetical Would You Rather decisions. These three simple words decide everything from what they eat to who they send home.

item.title: The American Experiment
item.description: Life. Liberty. The pursuit of happiness. This sweeping historical documentary series traces how the ideals of America's founders gave rise to a nation.
